meta.descriptionTemplate: {{brand}}'s coconut charcoal production capacity: {{capacity}} tons/day, {{capacityMonth}} tons/month across {{productionLines}} lines and {{ovenCount}} ovens. One 20ft container is ~{{oneContainerPctOfMonthly}}% of output.

tldr.heading: In short
tldr.body: {{brand}} produces about {{capacity}} tons of coconut shisha charcoal per day and {{capacityMonth}} tons per month — roughly {{annualTonsGrouped}} tons a year — across {{productionLines}} lines and {{ovenCount}} ovens. That is around {{containersPerMonth}} twenty-foot containers a month, so a single monthly container is a small share of output.

intro.p1: This page covers how much we can make and how fast, so you can size your program with confidence. It is part of our

throughput.body: What that capacity means per container. A 20-foot container holds about {{moqTons}} tons of coconut charcoal floor-loaded; a 40-foot container holds more by weight.
throughput.caption: Net payload and share of monthly output per container size.

headroom.body: At {{capacityMonth}} tons a month, a single 20-foot container — about {{moqTons}} tons — is roughly {{oneContainerPctOfMonthly}}% of our output. A monthly container, or several, sits comfortably within capacity, with room to scale your program as it grows without us deprioritizing existing buyers.
headroom.caveat: Capacity figures are typical, not a guarantee; available slots are confirmed at order.
headroom.consistencyLinkLabel: How we keep every batch consistent

equipment.body: The capacity figures are backed by real machinery, not a paper claim. Across {{productionLines}} production lines we run:
equipment.ovensNote: Plus {{ovenCount}} carbonization ovens, each {{ovenBatchTons}} tons per batch on a {{ovenCycleHours}}-hour cycle.

leadTime.body: Production runs {{leadTimeLabel}} for a 20-foot container — about {{repeatBrandLeadTime}} days for a repeat order and {{newBrandLeadTime}} days for a new brand. Sea freight is separate and depends on your destination.

items.q: How many production lines and ovens do you have?
items.a: {{productionLines}} production lines and {{ovenCount}} carbonization ovens. Together they produce {{capacity}} tons per day and {{capacityMonth}} tons per month.

items.q: How much can one oven produce?
items.a: Each oven carbonizes about {{ovenBatchTons}} tons of coconut shell per batch on a {{ovenCycleHours}}-hour cycle. With {{ovenCount}} ovens, that scales to {{capacityMonth}} tons of finished charcoal a month.

items.q: What is the lead time to produce a container?
items.a: {{leadTimeLabel}} for a 20-foot container — about {{repeatBrandLeadTime}} days for a repeat order and {{newBrandLeadTime}} days for a new brand. Shipping time is additional and depends on the destination port.

No. One 20-foot container is roughly {{oneContainerPctOfMonthly}}% of our {{capacityMonth}}-ton monthly output, so there is ample headroom for monthly contracts and for scaling up without crowding out other buyers.

items.q: Can you handle a Ramadan or seasonal peak?
items.a: Yes, with advance notice. Demand peaks before Ramadan and the summer shisha season; place confirmed orders 6–8 weeks earlier than usual to hold your delivery window, since slots are scheduled first-confirmed.
